prose:
The fukui-reactivity task on pyridine was executed successfully using DFT.

**Pyridine Fukui Reactivity Indices** — DFT, tier `standard` (**B3LYP/def2-TZVP**, density-fit) in PySCF, gas phase. Geometry: from user-provided `pyridine.xyz` file (single-point calculation). Neutral molecule: charge 0, multiplicity 1. Cation (N-1): charge 1, multiplicity 2. Anion (N+1): charge -1, multiplicity 2. All SCF calculations converged.

The most electrophilic site is Nitrogen (atom 1, index 0) with an f+ value of **0.48422572**.
The most nucleophilic site is Carbon (atom 4, index 3) with an f- value of **0.1182626**.

The full Fukui indices for each atom are:
| Atom | Index | Symbol | f+          | f-          | f0          | Dual Descriptor |
|------|-------|--------|-------------|-------------|-------------|-----------------|
